top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.availability LIKE '%rare%'
  AND l.format = 'Abundance'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.availability = 'rare'
  AND c.asciiName LIKE '%Abundance%'
  AND l.format = 'all'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.availability LIKE '%rare%'
  AND l.format = 'Abundance'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.availability = 'rare'
  AND c.asciiName LIKE '%Abundance%'
  AND l.format = 'all'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.availability LIKE '%rare%'
  AND l.format = 'Abundance'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Abundance'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%rare%'
  AND l.format = 'Standard'
  AND l.status = 'Legal'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM legalities l2
    WHERE l2.uuid = c.uuid
      AND l2.format IN ('Modern', 'Legacy', 'Vintage', 'Pioneer', 'Pauper', 'Commander', 'Brawl')
      AND l2.status != 'Legal'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.id = l.id
WHERE c.availability = 'rare'
  AND c.asciiName LIKE '%Abundance%'
  AND l.format = 'all'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.availability LIKE '%rare%'
  AND l.format = 'Abundance'
  AND l.status = 'Legal';
